creator: andreas.sommer87@googlemail.com
text:
Created attachment 180187
Patch to distinguish with separate error messages

While playing around with port options, specifically a "single" (only allows a single option), I was getting errors and was unsure if the options I set were actually applied correctly. Long story short: I had to figure out if the error "You must select one and only one option from the ${single} single" meant that 1) I have not chosen any option or 2) I have chosen more than one.

Hence I propose the attached patch to help beginners (like me) by clearly distinguishing those two error cases with separate error messages.
